data.name: Seo Hyun-chul

data.biography: Vinícius de Oliveira (born July 18, 1985) is a Brazilian actor. He was born in Rio de Janeiro. He lived in Bonsucesso, Rio de Janeiro with his mother, who had to work hard to support him and his three siblings. To make ends meet, he even started working as a shoe shiner, always dreaming of becoming a professional football player. Nevertheless, his life radically changed when, while shining shoes, he was discovered by director Walter Salles and cast to play the role of Josué in the acclaimed film Central do Brasil. Thanks to Salles' support Vinícius was able to take both English and theater lessons. He is currently enrolled as a student at PUC-RIO, where he intends to graduate as a film director. In addition to his groundbreaking role, he has also participated in several other projects such as the soap opera Suave Veneno Rede Globo and the film "Linha de Passe" that has been awarded in Cannes Film Festival.
data.name: Vinícius de Oliveira

data.biography: A South African born New Yorker with over three decades of versatile, award winning performances in popular, world-wide theatrically released studio & independent films, prime-time & cable television & New York theater. After small speaking roles opposite Russell Crowe in Ron Howard's A Beautiful Mind (2001) & David Chase's The Sopranos (1999) as Gaetano; his breakthrough lead role came in 2005 on Law & Order: Special Victims Unit (1999) directed by Oscar winner Juan José Campanella. Starring opposite Mariska Hargitay, Chris Meloni, & Bradley Cooper as the chilling yet engaging fundamentalist Milan Zergin. Also, a coveted recurring role on Ugly Betty (2006), becoming South Africa's first male SAG Award Nominee (Ensemble Comedy Performance). Followed by significant supporting roles in the studio films My Super Ex-Girlfriend (2006) opposite Eddie Izzard, Luke Wilson, & Uma Thurman directed by Ivan Reitman for Twentieth Century Fox . An ensemble lead in Sony's Starship Troopers 3: Marauder (2008) produced by David Lancaster, a supporting role in Pure Flix's What If... (2010), & supporting lead in the Lionsgate family film Army Dog (2016) .
data.name: Stelio Savante

data.biography: 一位出生于南非的纽约人，在流行的、全球影院发行的工作室和独立电影、黄金时段和有线电视以及纽约剧院中拥有超过三十年的多才多艺、屡获殊荣的表演。在罗恩·霍华德（Ron Howard）的《美丽心灵》（A Beautiful Mind，2001年）和大卫·蔡斯（David Chase）的《黑道家族》（The Sopranos，1999年）中与罗素·克劳（Russell Crowe）演对手戏后，饰演加埃塔诺（Gaetano）;2005年，他在奥斯卡奖得主胡安·何塞·坎帕内拉（Juan José Campanella）执导的《法律与秩序：特殊受害者》（Law & Order： Special Victims Unit，1999）中担任突破性的主角。与玛丽斯卡·哈吉泰、克里斯·梅洛尼和布拉德利·库珀演对手戏，饰演令人不寒而栗但引人入胜的原教旨主义者米兰·泽尔金。此外，在《丑陋的贝蒂》（2006 年）中，她经常出演令人垂涎的角色，成为南非第一位男性 SAG 奖提名人（合奏喜剧表演）。随后在工作室电影《我的超级前女友》（2006）中扮演重要配角，与埃迪·伊扎德、卢克·威尔逊和乌玛·瑟曼对戏，由伊万·雷特曼为二十世纪福克斯执导。大卫·兰开斯特（David Lancaster）制作的索尼《星际战队3：掠夺者》（2008）中的合奏主角，在Pure Flix的《如果...（2010年），并在狮门影业家庭电影《军犬》（2016年）中担任配角。
data.name: 斯泰利奥·萨万特

data.biography: 一位出生於南非的紐約人，在流行的、全球影院發行的工作室和獨立電影、黃金時段和有線電視以及紐約劇院中擁有超過三十年的多才多藝、屢獲殊榮的表演。在羅恩·霍華德（Ron Howard）的《有你終生美麗》（A Beautiful Mind，2001 年）和大衞·蔡斯（David Chase）的《黑道家族》（The Sopranos，1999 年）中與羅素·克勞（Russell Crowe）演對手戲後，飾演加埃塔諾（Gaetano）; 2005 年，他在奧斯卡獎得主胡安·何塞·坎帕內拉（Juan José Campanella）執導的《法律與秩序：特殊受害者》（Law & Order： Special Victims Unit，1999）中擔任突破性的主角。與瑪麗斯卡·哈吉泰、克里斯·梅洛尼和布拉德利·庫珀演對手戲，飾演令人不寒而栗但引人入勝的原教旨主義者米蘭·澤爾金。此外，在《醜陋的貝蒂》（2006 年）中，她經常出演令人垂涎的角色，成為南非第一位男性 SAG 獎提名人（合奏喜劇表演）。隨後在工作室電影《我的超人女友》（2006）中扮演重要配角，與埃迪·伊紮德、盧克·威爾遜和烏瑪·瑟曼對戲，由伊萬·雷特曼為二十世紀福克斯執導。大衞·蘭開斯特（David Lancaster）製作的索尼《星際戰隊 3：掠奪者》（2008）中的合奏主角，在 Pure Flix 的《如果. . . （2010 年），並在獅門影業家庭電影《軍犬》（2016 年）中擔任配角。
data.name: 斯泰利奧·薩萬特

data.biography: Tori Griffith started her acting career at the age of 11 in community theatre in the Conejo Valley. She began her work in TV and film at the age of 14. In a short span of time, she has accumulated an impressive body of work, including 20+ plays, commercials and short films. Tori is also one of the lead presenters in Disney's "World of English," and is a lead in a new web series on IFC called "The Fergusons." While acting is her primary passion, Tori is also a singer and was featured in a Nickelodeon promo for the movie, "Annie." In addition, she loves to write and has completed many short stories.
data.name: Tori Griffith

data.biography:
田所阳向（日语：田所 陽向／たどころ ひなた Tadokoro Hinata，1992年10月16日—）是日本的男性声优。东京都出身。81 Produce所属。

就读AMUSEMENT MEDIA综合学院声优艺人学科，第二年时在《妖精剑士f》饰演妖圣手下。2014年从AMUSEMENT MEDIA综合学院毕业。2015年4月1日加入81 Produce。
